'''鈭歬-b-ng''' ('''kakabang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heatshock|heatshock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heatshock|heatshock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-b-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kakabang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikabang|thikabang]] || [[word:jikabang|jikabang]] || [[word:shikabang|shikabang]] || [[word:kikabang|kikabang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukabang|thuthukabang]] || [[word:jujukabang|jujukabang]] || [[word:shushukabang|shushukabang]] || [[word:kukukabang|kukukabang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukabang|thukabang]] || [[word:jukabang|jukabang]] || [[word:shukabang|shukabang]] || [[word:kukabang|kukabang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukabang|thukabang]] || [[word:jukabang|jukabang]] || [[word:shukabang|shukabang]] || [[word:kukabang|kukabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekabang|thekabang]] || [[word:jekabang|jekabang]] || [[word:shekabang|shekabang]] || [[word:kekabang|kekabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokabang|thothokabang]] || [[word:jojokabang|jojokabang]] || [[word:shoshokabang|shoshokabang]] || [[word:kokokabang|kokokabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokabang|thokabang]] || [[word:jokabang|jokabang]] || [[word:shokabang|shokabang]] || [[word:kokabang|kokabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokabang|thokabang]] || [[word:jokabang|jokabang]] || [[word:shokabang|shokabang]] || [[word:kokabang|kokabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kabang|th忙kabang]] || [[word:j忙kabang|j忙kabang]] || [[word:sh忙kabang|sh忙kabang]] || [[word:k忙kabang|k忙kabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakabang|thathakabang]] || [[word:jajakabang|jajakabang]] || [[word:shashakabang|shashakabang]] || [[word:kakakabang|kakakabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakabang|thakabang]] || [[word:jakabang|jakabang]] || [[word:shakabang|shakabang]] || [[word:kakabang|kakabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakabang|thakabang]] || [[word:jakabang|jakabang]] || [[word:shakabang|shakabang]] || [[word:kakabang|kakabang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakabang|shakabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakabang|goshakabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakabang|gokishakabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakabangn眉|shakabangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakabangnkn眉|goshakabangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakabangn眉|gokishakabangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakabangsh毛|shakabangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakabangnksh毛|goshakabangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakabangsh毛|gokishakabangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakabangro|shakabangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakabangnkro|goshakabangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakabangro|gokishakabangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakabangmu|shakabangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakabangnkmu|goshakabangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakabangmu|gokishakabangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakabangsher|shakabangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakabangnksher|goshakabangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakabangsher|gokishakabangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakabang|shakabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakabangnkng|goshakabangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakabang|gokishakabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakabangya|shakabangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakabangnkya|goshakabangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakabangya|gokishakabangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakabangyam|shakabangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakabangnkyam|goshakabangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakabangyam|gokishakabangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakabangn眉sh毛|shakabangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakabangnkn眉sh毛|goshakabangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakabangn眉sh毛|gokishakabangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakabangn眉ro|shakabangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakabangnkn眉ro|goshakabangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakabangn眉ro|gokishakabangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakabangn眉mu|shakabangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakabangnkn眉mu|goshakabangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakabangn眉mu|gokishakabangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakabangsh毛n眉|shakabangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakabangnksh毛n眉|goshakabangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakabangsh毛n眉|gokishakabangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakabangsh毛ro|shakabangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakabangnksh毛ro|goshakabangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakabangsh毛ro|gokishakabangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakabangsh毛mu|shakabangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakabangnksh毛mu|goshakabangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakabangsh毛mu|gokishakabangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakabangron眉|shakabangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakabangnkron眉|goshakabangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakabangron眉|gokishakabangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakabangrosh毛|shakabangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakabangnkrosh毛|goshakabangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakabangrosh毛|gokishakabangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakabangromu|shakabangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakabangnkromu|goshakabangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakabangromu|gokishakabangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakabangmun眉|shakabangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakabangnkmun眉|goshakabangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakabangmun眉|gokishakabangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakabangmush毛|shakabangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakabangnkmush毛|goshakabangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakabangmush毛|gokishakabangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakabangmuro|shakabangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakabangnkmuro|goshakabangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakabangmuro|gokishakabangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
